citations.narrative:
A routine inspection was attempted on 03/19/2025 at 8:30 am. Upon arrival the inspector tried to locate the company’s
office at the address provided at the time of registration. However, the company’s office could not be found. An online
search yielded a different address for the registrant. Upon arrival at the new address the inspector was notified that the
company moved to the new location approximately 2 months ago. An updated address is critical to verify animal welfare
and compliance with the Animal Welfare Act. The address information in the Animal Care office is no longer valid. The
registrant shall notify the Deputy Administrator by certified mail of any change in name, address, ownership or change of
operation within 10 days after making such a change.
Correct this day forward of 19 March 2026.
No regulated animals present at this time.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
n

narrative:
2.27(a) 
   
Notification of change of operation. 
A routine inspection was attempted on 03/19/2025 at 8:30 am. Upon arrival the inspector tried to locate the company’s 
office at the address provided at the time of registration. However, the company’s office could not be found. An online 
search yielded a different address for the registrant. Upon arrival at the new address the inspector was notified that the 
company moved to the new location approximately 2 months ago. An updated address is critical to verify animal welfare 
and compliance with the Animal Welfare Act. The address information in the Animal Care office is no longer valid. The 
registrant shall notify the Deputy Administrator by certified mail of any change in name, address, ownership or change of 
operation within 10 days after making such a change. 
 
Correct this day forward of 19 March 2026. 
 
No regulated animals present at this time. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative. 
 
 n
